## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?
- What user/problem does it address?

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Tooling

## Change Details

1. Key implementation notes
2. API/CLI changes (if any)
3. Backward compatibility notes

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Manual smoke run (if applicable)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed behavior

Commands/output summary:

```text
# Paste concise test output here
```

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE updated (if system flow changed)
- [ ] KT_RUNBOOK updated (if handoff/runbook changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] Logging/errors are structured and useful
- [ ] Config knobs routed through `settings.py` where appropriate

- Known risks:
- Deferred follow-ups:
